## Checklist

- [ ] One logical change per PR (AGENTS.md section 9)
- [ ] Conventional commit messages with an `Agent:` trailer (e.g. `Agent: claude-1`)
- [ ] `make test` passes (contracts, SDK, app)
- [ ] No hardcoded private keys anywhere; SPDX headers on new source files
- [ ] No em dashes in committed prose (commits, docs, frontend copy)
- [ ] Stays within my column (AGENTS.md section 3), or includes the coordination note below

## Coordination note
